---
title: AI Usage Disclosure
date-modified: last-modified
modified-title: Last updated
description: How I use AI on this website and my thoughts towards AI as a whole.
title-block-banner: true
toc: true
toc-location: left
---

::: {.callout-note icon="false" title="AI Usage Disclosure"}
::: {.fs-5}
The writing on this website is by me personally. 

Some code (visualizations, config files, etc.) is generated by Anthropic's Claude or OpenAI's ChatGPT.

Text is sometimes proofread by tools like Grammarly or Claude.

Should I ever use LLMs beyond code generation and proofreading to create content, I will disclose it at the top of the relevant page.
:::
:::
